g.text: Step 1 — Explore the live site, THEN write a plan
open the site & click through it
Step 2 — Reuse what works, write the rest
matching test scripts from past runs ->
Step 3 — Run for real, then self-heal
run every test in the browser
fixes that worked before for similar failures
repair what failed · park the unfixable
Step 4 — Explain the results, then remember them
save this run -> next run is smarter
Playwright (the real browser) is driven in
explores the site, and when the tests are run before the Evolver heals them.
— without it the same four agents still run, just "cold".
